mapper.sql: u.id, u.openid, u.is_bot, u.bot_search_depth_min, u.bot_search_depth_max, u.bot_ai_style, u.unionid, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.gender, u.piece_skin_id, COALESCE(r.elo_score, 1200) AS elo_score, r.title_name, COALESCE(r.activity_points, 0) AS activity_points, COALESCE(r.consecutive_wins, 0) AS consecutive_wins, COALESCE(r.consecutive_losses, 0) AS consecutive_losses, COALESCE(r.today_net_change, 0) AS today_net_change, COALESCE(r.elo_carry_over, 0) AS elo_carry_over, r.last_rating_reset_date, COALESCE(r.runaway_count, 0) AS runaway_count, COALESCE(r.total_games, 0) AS total_games, COALESCE(r.win_count, 0) AS win_count, COALESCE(r.draw_count, 0) AS draw_count, r.season_end_score, COALESCE(r.placement_fair_games, 0) AS placement_fair_games, COALESCE(r.newbie_match_games, 0) AS newbie_match_games, COALESCE(r.newbie_runaway_tally, 0) AS newbie_runaway_tally, COALESCE(r.low_trust, 0) AS low_trust, u.last_login_at, u.created_at, u.updated_at
FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_rating r ON r.user_id = u.id
mapper.select: SELECT piece_skin_id FROM users WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
WHERE u.id = #{id} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (openid, unionid, nickname, avatar_url, gender, last_login_at) VALUES (#{openid}, #{unionid}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{lastLoginAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET unionid = #{unionid}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt} WHERE openid = #{openid}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE is_bot = 1 ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_rating ( user_id, elo_score, title_name, activity_points, consecutive_wins, consecutive_losses, today_net_change, elo_carry_over, last_rating_reset_date, runaway_count, total_games, win_count, draw_count, season_end_score, placement_fair_games, newbie_match_games, newbie_runaway_tally, low_trust ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{eloScore}, #{titleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activityPoints}, #{consecutiveWins}, #{consecutiveLosses}, #{todayNetChange}, #{eloCarryOver}, #{lastRatingResetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{runawayCount}, #{totalGames}, #{winCount}, #{drawCount}, #{seasonEndScore,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{placementFairGames}, #{newbieMatchGames}, #{newbieRunawayTally}, #{lowTrust} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE elo_score = VALUES(elo_score), title_name = VALUES(title_name), activity_points = VALUES(activity_points), consecutive_wins = VALUES(consecutive_wins), consecutive_losses = VALUES(consecutive_losses), today_net_change = VALUES(today_net_change), elo_carry_over = VALUES(elo_carry_over), last_rating_reset_date = VALUES(last_rating_reset_date), runaway_count = VALUES(runaway_count), total_games = VALUES(total_games), win_count = VALUES(win_count), draw_count = VALUES(draw_count), season_end_score = VALUES(season_end_score), placement_fair_games = VALUES(placement_fair_games), newbie_match_games = VALUES(newbie_match_games), newbie_runaway_tally = VALUES(newbie_runaway_tally), low_trust = VALUES(low_trust)
